coordinate_notes.pred_tracks: 2D tracks in padded square track-image coordinates.
coordinate_notes.original_coords: [x1, y1, x2, y2, original_width, original_height] in padded square coordinates.
coordinate_notes.points_3d: Tracked 3D points corresponding to the exported track points.
coordinate_notes.points_rgb: RGB colors for points_3d, uint8 in 0..255.
